channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Brandon Declares State of Emergency as River Levels Rise
item.description: The City of Brandon has declared a state of emergency due to provincial forecasts predicting rising water levels in the Assiniboine and Shellmouth river basins. Mayor Jeff Fawcett emphasized the preca...

item.title: Kenya's Millennials Celebrate Nostalgia at Ngong Racecourse Event
item.description: Thousands of revelers gathered at Ngong Racecourse for the annual Millennials Cookout, a vibrant celebration of 90s and early 2000s nostalgia. The event featured a Rodeo Chic theme with attendees dres...

item.title: Sabalenka Reflects on Wimbledon Loss to Osaka, Vows to Improve
item.description: World number one Aryna Sabalenka suffered a fourth-round defeat to Naomi Osaka at Wimbledon 2026, marking her first straight-sets loss in a Grand Slam in six years. The match, played on Centre Court, ...

item.title: Landslide Disrupts Mumbai-Pune Expressway Traffic Amid Heavy Rains
item.description: A major landslide blocked the Mumbai-Pune expressway's 'Missing Link' section, halting traffic on Monday. The incident occurred in a landslide-prone area of the Rs 7,000 crore project inaugurated just...

item.title: Ronaldo Announces 2026 World Cup as Final Tournament
item.description: Portugal's football icon, Cristiano Ronaldo, has officially declared that the 2026 FIFA World Cup will mark the end of his international career. The 41-year-old captain made this revelation ahead of P...

item.title: Government Defends Fuel Procurement Arrangement with Vitol Supplier Amid Opposition Accusations
item.description: The fuel import debate in Tanzania has intensified as the government defends its decision to engage Swiss-based supplier Vitol for petroleum products. Opposition parties ACT-Wazalendo and Chadema have...

item.title: Senate approves Chiz Escudero as presiding officer for Sara Duterte's impeachment trial
item.description: The impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte began in the Senate on July 6, 2026, with Senator Chiz Escudero presiding over the proceedings. This decision followed a constitutional debate, as ...

item.title: PPP Leader Amjad Hussain Sworn In As Gilgit-Baltistan Chief Minister
item.description: Pakistan Peoples Party (PPP) leader Amjad Hussain was sworn in as the new chief minister of Gilgit-Baltistan on Monday, following his party’s victory in the 2026 regional elections. The oath-taking ce...

item.title: Rivers State Government Urged to Resolve Chieftaincy Dispute
item.description: The Rumueme Council in Rivers State has demanded the Rivers State Government (RSG) to intervene in a long-standing chieftaincy dispute, highlighting the need for a formal inquiry to resolve the confli...

item.title: Democrats Should Respect Military Software Providers
item.description: The article argues that Democrats must recognize the critical role of military software providers in national security. Author Max Baucus, a former U.S. Senator and ambassador to China, emphasizes tha...

item.title: Child critically injured in major highway collision near Brisbane
item.description: A primary school-aged child is in critical condition at Queensland Children's Hospital following a severe collision on the Mount Lindesay Highway near Gleneagle. The incident occurred around 2.15pm on...

item.title: Federal Workers Return to Office Four Days a Week Amid Space and Parking Concerns
item.description: Federal workers in Canada are transitioning to a four-day in-office requirement under the RTO4 mandate, which has raised significant concerns about office space, parking, and public transit. The polic...

item.title: Dustin Hurt's Net Worth and Career in Gold Rush
item.description: Dustin Hurt, a member of the Dakota Boys mining family, has built a successful career in gold hunting and reality TV. Born in 1977 in New Orleans, Louisiana, he grew up in Alaska and started working i...

item.title: Jordan Henderson Injured During England's 'Wonderwall' Singalong After World Cup Win
item.description: Following England's dramatic 3-2 victory over Mexico in the World Cup, midfielder Jordan Henderson suffered a wrist injury during a celebratory 'Wonderwall' singalong with fans. The incident occurred ...

item.title: WA byelection highlights political tensions ahead of federal contest
item.description: A significant political test for One Nation is emerging in Western Australia following the resignation of a senior minister from the Cook government, triggering a byelection in a Perth suburb. The sea...

item.title: Pakistan's Education Crisis: 25 Million Children Out of School Despite Constitutional Guarantees
item.description: The article highlights Pakistan's severe education crisis, with 25 million children out of school despite constitutional guarantees and repeated policy commitments. It explores systemic issues such as...

item.title: An Oscar as a Symbol of Grief and Hope After a Tragic School Shooting
item.description: The article details how the Academy Award-winning documentary 'All the Empty Rooms' has become a poignant symbol of grief and hope for families affected by school shootings. Centered on Jackie Cazares...

item.title: Historical Events of July 6th: From Papal Bulls to Modern Tragedies
item.description: The article compiles significant historical events occurring on July 6th across centuries, highlighting pivotal moments that shaped global history. Key events include Pope Clement VI's 1348 papal bull...

item.title: Senate Returns Sara Duterte’s Tax Records to BIR
item.description: The impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte began at the Senate on July 6, 2026, with Trial Presiding Officer Chiz Escudero ordering the return of her tax records to the Bureau of Internal Re...

item.title: England midfielder Jordan Henderson sustains wrist injury after celebration incident against Mexico
item.description: England's midfielder Jordan Henderson has sustained a serious wrist injury following a freak accident during post-match celebrations after their 3-2 victory over Mexico at the Estadio Azteca. The inci...
